workflow.name: Puber Release Preparation
workflow.description: Prepare a Puber release branch and version bump, push only after approval, and clean up safely.

transition_groups.description: Start release branch preparation from the task body.
Local release branch is prepared; approval required before optional push/finalization.
Release preparation is blocked by missing version/base branch, dirty unsafe state, or git access.
Release branch is finalized or push was intentionally skipped; run conservative cleanup.
Release verification or push is blocked.
Cleanup report is ready; finish the task.

edges.prompt_template:
Run Puber release branch preparation for this Kent task.

Read .kent/project-contract.md first, then use .kent/commands/release-branch.md. Treat the task body as the desired base branch/version policy. If base branch or version policy is ambiguous and cannot be safely derived, complete blocked with blocker_reason instead of guessing.

Prepare the local release branch and version bump. Do not push to remote unless explicitly authorized by a later approval. Prefer .kent/worktrees/release-<version> if the main worktree is dirty. Complete with verify when local release preparation is complete and provide release_version, release_branch, base_branch, worktree_path, commit_hash, and push_plan. Complete with blocked if preparation is blocked and provide blocker_reason.

Verify and finalize the prepared Puber release branch.

Read .kent/project-contract.md first. Check release {{.Params.release_version}} on branch {{.Params.release_branch}} at {{.Params.commit_hash}}. Verify the local branch status and version bump. Push only if the task/approval clearly authorizes the push described in {{.Params.push_plan}}; otherwise report that push was skipped.

Complete with done if release preparation is finalized. Complete with blocked if verification or push is blocked and provide blocker_reason.

parameters.description: Release version prepared by this task.
Local release branch prepared by this task.
Base branch used for release preparation.
Path to the release worktree or main checkout used for preparation.
Commit hash containing the release version bump.
What will be pushed or deliberately skipped after approval.
Why release preparation cannot continue, in the task language when practical.

edges.prompt_template: Run conservative Puber task cleanup. Read .kent/project-contract.md first, then use .kent/commands/cleanup-task.md. Do not remove a release worktree if it contains unpushed release work; report it instead. Complete with done and provide cleanup_report.

parameters.description: Why verification/finalization cannot continue, in the task language when practical.
Summary of cleanup performed or deliberately skipped.
